Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court Ordering Pltf To Attend Medical, Psychiatric Examinations And A Vocational Evaluation
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Michael J. Partos, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Webcor Construction, Inc.
Jonathan E. Davis, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Gilardo Cortes

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Webcor Construction's motion for an order compelling plaintiff to attend further medical evaluations is granted in part. The Court finds good cause to order that plaintiff submit to an additional three examinations by an orthopedic surgeon, urologist, and a psychiatrist. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
